title: erianthus ciliaris
intro: Erianthus ciliaris, also known as Indian grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the United States and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erianthus ciliaris include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Erianthus ciliaris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
